title: orobanche minor subsp. alsatica
intro: Orobanche minor subsp. alsatica, also known as Alsatic Broomrape, is a parasitic plant that belongs to the family Orobanchaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating gastrointestinal problems. Alsatic Broomrape is typically used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, which can be consumed as teas or added to other remedies for its therapeutic properties.
